---
id: build-list-all
title: "List all builds"
description: "List all the Bitrise builds that can be accessed with the authenticated account. Filter builds based on their owner, using the owner slug, or the status of the build."
sidebar_label: "List all builds"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List all builds"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/builds"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all the Bitrise builds that can be accessed with the authenticated account. Filter builds based on their owner, using the owner slug, or the status of the build.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
